2026-04-24T22:38:43.2864201Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2864734Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2865150Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2865513Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2865827Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2866066Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2866235Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-24T22:38:43.2867578Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion).
